text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to take a walk during lunch one day,
when...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Energize your body! Delightful and refreshing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'll tell you what's going on! I'm gonna be in a
commercial for a sports drink!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
The company contacted the academy directly and
said I'd be a good fit!
choice_data_list: They're right. You really suit their image.
They're right. You really suit their image.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, hearing you say that really pumps me up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I was gonna turn 'em down at first.
The offer came so suddenly, you know?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But I'm happy to do it if people think it's a good
idea like you do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: So I'll go all in, for everyone who's supporting me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'm gonna make a great commercial!
Delightful and refreshing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That day after class...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Just take a deep breath and say to yourself,
"delightful and refreshing"... Yeah! I got this!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Heh, this is the same feeling I get before a race.

text_block_list.name: Camera Crew Member
text_block_list.text:
Okay, everyone, let's begin shooting! Mejiro
Ryan, you're up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: R-right! I'll do my best!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Energize your body! Delightful and refreshing!

text_block_list.name: Camera Crew Member
text_block_list.text: And cut! One moment while I check the take.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Haha, it's weird, I didn't really do all that much
physically, but I'm kinda wiped out from the
nerves.

text_block_list.name: Camera Crew Member
text_block_list.text: Hmmm, we might have to take that again.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Um... Is something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Camera Crew Member
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's nothing to do with your performance. But
there's just something that doesn't feel right.

text_block_list.name: Camera Crew Member
text_block_list.text:
Your appeal, or rather your essence, isn't really
shining through in this clip.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: My "essence"?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Well, I guess a lot of other people would do a
better job at it than me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
They recommended me for the role because they
thought I fit the brand's image.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hmm... But how can I express my essence?
choice_data_list: Try being yourself, instead of just acting.

You could show off your energetic personality
even more.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Be... myself?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, I see! So when I'm sweating and out of
breath, it should be for real, not just pretend!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And if I move like I normally do, then my
"essence" should show up better!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, can I have a little extra time? I'd like
to go running!

text_block_list.name: Camera Crew Member
text_block_list.text:
Sure! That could lend an air of realism to the
commercial and really get the message through!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Thank you! Okay, be right back!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... Thanks, Nature!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, don't mention it. If I may say, you seem
especially spirited right now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Heh, you're right, I am! I worked up a real good
sweat!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You're really taking your training seriously.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, Dober! Perfect timing! Let's go running!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait, why would I want to go running now?!

text_block_list.name: Camera Crew Member
text_block_list.text:
Dripping with sweat, face flushed but with an
energetic expression—yes! This is what a sporty
girl looks like!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan continues to run until she's sweaty
and exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But thanks to her efforts, the commercial turns
out well and the drink starts flying off the shelves.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Be more energetic?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ohh, I see! That's what was missing when it came to showing what I'm really like!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! Do you think we could change
locations? Come with me—I'll show you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Everyone will tell you that I'm all about the
muscles! So what's missing is... more muscle!

text_block_list.name: Camera Crew Member
text_block_list.text: Uh... m-more?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Lemme start warming them up! You'll see!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Time to get swole!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
First we're gonna do some bench presses! Look at
these pecs come alive!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Now my deltoids and forearms are starting to wake up! They wanna know when it's their time to shine!

text_block_list.name: Camera Crew Member
text_block_list.text:
I'm not quite sure I follow you... but I really love
the energy!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I can feel the burn now! Next, I'm gonna get my
lower half going with some leg presses!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Let's get SWOLE!

text_block_list.name: Camera Crew Member
text_block_list.text:
Hurry, get this on video! There's a lot more going
on here than in the script we wrote!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan wins over the staff by just being
herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once the commercial begins airing, it has a huge
impact, and the drink starts flying off the shelves.
